description: Connect New Relic to sync alert policies, APM applications, incidents, and dashboards for observability intelligence.

install_fields.label: User API Key
install_fields.help: Found in New Relic → Profile icon → API Keys → Create key (User key type)

install_fields.label: Account ID
install_fields.help: Found in New Relic → Profile icon → Administration → Account details, or in the URL after /accounts/

install_fields.label: Region (US or EU)
install_fields.help: Select US for api.newrelic.com or EU for api.eu.newrelic.com. Leave blank for US default.

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate API key and account_id, record connector as installed

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify API key is still valid via GET /v2/applications.json

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Sync alerts, applications, incidents, and dashboards to knowledge base

methods.name: list_alerts
methods.description: List all alert policies with pagination

methods.name: list_applications
methods.description: List all APM applications with pagination

methods.name: list_incidents
methods.description: List recent alert incidents via NerdGraph

methods.name: list_dashboards
methods.description: List all dashboards via NerdGraph entity search

methods.name: run_nrql
methods.description: Execute a NRQL query via NerdGraph and return results

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync alerts, applications, incidents, and dashboards from New Relic.

apis.name: List Alerts
apis.description: Fetch all alert policies from New Relic, paginating automatically.

apis.name: List Applications
apis.description: Fetch all APM applications from New Relic, paginating automatically.

apis.name: List Incidents
apis.description: Fetch recent alert incidents from New Relic via NerdGraph.

apis.name: List Dashboards
apis.description: Fetch dashboards from New Relic via NerdGraph entity search.

apis.name: Run Nrql
apis.description: Execute a NRQL query via NerdGraph and return the results.

name: NewRelicConnector
